name: Rhubarb Custard Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups rhubarb, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rhubarb, eggs, sugar, flour, and salt in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into an unbaked 10-inch pie shell.
3. Pour the whipping cream over the top of the filling.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
5. Reduce the heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking until set.
